name: MapFan API
description: Increment Ps Japanese maps & geocoding API — POIs, reverse geocode and route search tuned for JP addresses.

seo.title: MapFan API — Maps / Geolocation / Routing
seo.meta_description: MapFan API: Increment Ps Japanese maps & geocoding API — POIs, reverse geocode and route search tuned for JP addresses.

when_to_use: Geocoding and address lookup tuned for Japanese postal formats
POI search for Japanese locations with precise address data
Route search API with Japanese road network accuracy
Address normalization for Japanese enterprise applications
Japanese map tiles and spatial queries for domestic apps

pros: POI database tuned to Japanese buildings
Reverse geocoding handles complex JP addresses
Reliable routing for JP-specific road rules
cons: Less developer-friendly than Google or Mapbox
review.verdict: Essential for JP-only mapping where address parsing matters; skip for anything international.
review.best_for: Japanese logistics, real-estate, and delivery apps
review.not_for: Global apps with only incidental Japan coverage
